title: Unclassified SPE-pattern entities in communication web
narrative: Entity co-mention analysis across the corpus surfaced 8 vehicle-like entities that co-occur heavily with known special-purpose entities but appear NOWHERE in finance.spe_entities and carry no RelatedParty glossary classification: marlin (416), osprey (380), yosemite (162), rawhide (105), fishtail (76), talon (72), condor (28), porcupine (23) (co-mention totals with known SPEs). Several are documented off-balance-sheet vehicles in the public record (Talon was the internal entity of Raptor I; Marlin and Osprey funded Whitewing; Yosemite issued credit-linked notes). PROPOSAL: classify these entities RelatedParty/SPE in the glossary and extend finance.spe_entities. Awaiting human review -- this finding is tagged pending-review until an investigator confirms or rejects it.
